name: Advocate Report Generation
description: Multi-format report generation for Advocate review results. Renders Review objects to terminal (with ANSI color support), JSON, and HTML outputs. Terminal rendering includes severity-coded findings, persona summaries, and disagreement detection. HTML output uses Jinja2 templating with embedded dark-mode stylesheet.

functions.name: print_review
functions.description: Prints a formatted Review to terminal with optional ANSI color codes. Outputs header with target/findings/cost summary, iterates persona_reports showing findings sorted by severity, and displays disagreements if present. Uses _SEV_COLORS for severity highlighting and PERSONA_META for persona metadata.

inputs.name: review
inputs.description: The Review object containing persona reports, findings, and disagreements

inputs.name: color
inputs.description: Whether to include ANSI color escape codes in output

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: Review object missing required attributes (target, total_findings, persona_reports, etc.)

preconditions: Each report.persona must exist as a key in PERSONA_META
Each finding must have a severity attribute that can be indexed in list(Severity)
postconditions: Formatted text written to stdout via print()

structured_side_effects.description: Prints formatted review with headers, findings, summaries, and disagreements

functions.name: write_json
functions.description: Serializes a Review object to JSON and writes to the specified file path. Uses pydantic's model_dump_json with 2-space indentation.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Filesystem path where JSON will be written

error_cases.name: OSError
error_cases.condition: Path is not writable or directory does not exist

error_cases.name: PermissionError
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to write to path

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: review does not have model_dump_json method

preconditions: review must be a pydantic BaseModel with model_dump_json() method
path must be a valid Path object
postconditions: File at path contains JSON representation of review with indent=2
File is overwritten if it already exists
side_effects: Writes file to filesystem at path location

functions.name: write_html
functions.description: Renders a Review object to HTML using the _HTML Jinja2 template and writes to the specified file path. Injects PERSONA_META and __version__ into template context. Template generates dark-mode styled report with summary cards, persona findings, and disagreements.

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: Filesystem path where HTML will be written

error_cases.name: OSError
error_cases.condition: Path is not writable or directory does not exist

error_cases.name: PermissionError
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to write to path

error_cases.name: KeyError
error_cases.condition: Persona value not found in PERSONA_META during dict comprehension

error_cases.name: AttributeError
error_cases.condition: Review object missing attributes referenced in template

preconditions: review object must have attributes used in template (target, target_type, review_id, started_at, total_findings, persona_reports, disagreements, total_cost_usd)
_HTML template must be initialized and valid Jinja2 Template
All Persona enum values must exist in PERSONA_META
postconditions: File at path contains rendered HTML with embedded CSS
File is overwritten if it already exists
side_effects: Writes file to filesystem at path location

invariants: _SEV_COLORS maps Severity enum members to ANSI escape codes
_HTML is a pre-compiled Jinja2 Template constant containing the full HTML template
PERSONA_META must contain entries for all Persona enum values
Severity enum ordering determines finding sort order in terminal output

data_access.rationale: Reads persona metadata and version for rendering context; writes JSON/HTML files to user-specified paths

side_effects.rationale: print_review outputs formatted text to stdout
write_json and write_html persist review data to filesystem

authority.rationale: Owns all report rendering logic for Advocate reviews across terminal, JSON, and HTML formats
